stemHtml: After departure a multi-engined piston aeroplane's propeller anti-icing system fails and ice starts to form on the propellers. This is a potential hazard because...

options.a: increased weight due to the ice is likely to change the CG and cause control problems.
options.b: the extra stress on the engines could cause an engine failure.
options.c: ice forming close to the propeller tips reduces efficiency and so unbalances the thrust of the blades.
options.d: reduced propeller efficiency will reduce the climb gradient, reducing terrain clearance.
